description: Single source of truth for the Massed Compute MCP tool catalog. Consumed by both the Node and Python wrapper packages at build time. Any change here must be propagated by running `npm run sync-tools` from the repo root before publishing.

tools.name: gpu_inventory_list
tools.title: List GPU inventory
tools.description: Retrieve the available GPU configurations, their specs, pricing, and current capacity by region. See https://vm-docs.massedcompute.com/api/v1 for the full response shape.

tools.name: images_list
tools.title: List VM images
tools.description: Retrieve the catalog of preconfigured VM images available for deployment.

tools.name: instances_list
tools.title: List running instances
tools.description: Retrieve all running VM instances for the authenticated account. Sensitive credentials (e.g. cleartext VM password) are redacted in the response.

tools.name: instances_get
tools.title: Get a running instance
tools.description: Retrieve a single running VM instance by its UUID. Sensitive credentials (e.g. cleartext VM password) are redacted in the response.

tools.name: instances_launch
tools.title: Launch a new instance
tools.description: Deploy a new VM instance. Requires billing to be configured (recharge amount and threshold). This action incurs cost.

imageId.description: ID of the VM image to deploy.

productName.description: Product name of the GPU instance to deploy, e.g. 'gpu_1x_l40'.

regionName.description: Region name. Use 'any' to let us choose.

instanceName.description: Optional human-readable name for the instance.

coupon.description: Optional coupon code to apply at deploy time.

command.description: Optional startup command to run on boot.

sshKeys.description: Optional list of SSH key names to attach to the instance.

tools.name: instances_restart
tools.title: Restart instances
tools.description: Restart one or more running VM instances by UUID. The VM will be briefly unavailable during the reboot; data on the instance's disks is preserved.

tools.name: instances_terminate
tools.title: Terminate instances
tools.description: Terminate one or more running VM instances by UUID. DESTRUCTIVE: this stops billing for the listed instances and permanently deletes their data; the action cannot be undone. Confirm with the user before invoking.

tools.name: coupon_information
tools.title: Get coupon information
tools.description: Look up information about a coupon by code.

tools.name: coupon_accepted_products
tools.title: List products a coupon is valid for
tools.description: Look up which products a coupon code can be applied to, with current inventory availability.

annotations.title: List products a coupon is valid for

tools.name: account_token_validation
tools.title: Validate API token
tools.description: Confirm that your Massed Compute API key is valid and active.

tools.name: account_billing
tools.title: Get account billing snapshot
tools.description: Retrieve billing settings for the account, including billing method and recharge configuration.

tools.name: ssh_keys_list
tools.title: List SSH keys
tools.description: List SSH keys associated with the authenticated account.

tools.name: ssh_keys_create
tools.title: Add an SSH key
tools.description: Add a new SSH public key to the authenticated account.

tools.name: ssh_keys_delete
tools.title: Delete an SSH key
tools.description: Remove an SSH key from the account. DESTRUCTIVE: any instances relying on this key may lose access. Confirm with the user before invoking.

sshKeyId.description: UUID of the SSH key to remove, as returned by `ssh_keys_list`.
